name: Windows Release Reliability Dry Run
description: Small non-destructive reliability/readiness lane for agent status, component health, offline queue/backpressure surfaces, driver stress/drop budget shape, and release action rollback planning. The profile is executable, but every command is report-only.

evidence_scope: tamandua-ctl status --detailed when IPC is available
tamandua-ctl status --metrics when IPC is available
read-only offline queue database discovery and size metadata
driver stress budget and drop counter surfaces declared without generating load
rollback/uninstall explicitly planned but not executed
promotion_requires: agent online/offline state matches backend state during repeated reconnects
bounded offline queue replay proves ACK-safe drain without local data loss
backpressure metrics are surfaced in tamandua-ctl JSON and benchmark reports
driver stress tests record channel drops, kernel drops, queue depth, latency, and recovery after burst load
rollback/uninstall are executed only in a disposable clean template with audit evidence

claim_boundary: Dry-run release reliability only. Passing this profile proves that safe reliability probes are runnable or gracefully report missing APIs; it does not prove stress, reconnect, replay, rollback, uninstall, driver unload/reload, or production release readiness.

tests.name: Agent Component Status Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ctl = Get-Command tamandua-ctl.exe,tamandua-ctl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($ctl) { & $ctl.Source --json status --detailed } else { [pscustomobject]@{ status='tamandua_ctl_not_found'; fallback='service_inventory'; checked='report_only'; services=@(Get-Service -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'tamandua' -or $_.DisplayName -match 'tamandua' } | Select-Object Name,Status,StartType) } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }"

tests.name: Backpressure Metrics Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ctl = Get-Command tamandua-ctl.exe,tamandua-ctl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($ctl) { & $ctl.Source --json status --metrics } else { [pscustomobject]@{ status='metrics_api_not_available'; expected_surface='tamandua-ctl --json status --metrics'; checked='report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }"

tests.name: Offline Queue Metadata Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$roots = @((Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'Tamandua'), (Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Tamandua'), (Join-Path $env:APPDATA 'Tamandua')) | Where-Object { $_ -and (Test-Path $_) }; $dbs = foreach ($root in $roots) { Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -File -Recurse -Include '*tamandua*.db','*tamandua*.sqlite','*sync*.db','*sync*.sqlite' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'tamandua|sync|offline' } | Select-Object -First 20 }; $dbs = @($dbs | Select-Object -Unique FullName); if ($dbs.Count -eq 0) { [pscustomobject]@{ status='offline_queue_store_not_found'; scope='metadata_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { $dbs | ForEach-Object { [pscustomobject]@{ Path=$_.FullName; Length=$_.Length; LastWriteTimeUtc=$_.LastWriteTimeUtc; QueueRowCount='not_read_without_sqlite_client' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }"

tests.name: Driver Stress Budget Report Only
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$drivers = @(& sc.exe query type= driver state= all 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'tamandua|tamd' -CaseSensitive:$false | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }); [pscustomobject]@{ DriverCandidateLines=$drivers; StressExecution='planned_not_executed'; RequiredCounters=@('driver_channel_drops','driver_kernel_drops','queue_depth','event_latency_ms','burst_recovery_seconds'); RequiredWorkloads=@('process_burst','file_burst','network_burst','service_restart_during_load'); RuntimeEffect='none_report_only' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

tests.name: Rollback Uninstall Safety Plan
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[pscustomobject]@{ Rollback='planned_not_executed'; Uninstall='planned_not_executed'; DriverUnload='planned_not_executed'; ServiceRestart='planned_not_executed'; RequiredEnvironment='disposable_clean_template'; CheckedBy='windows-release-reliability-dry-run' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
